title: Beyth #1031
definition:
Beth-hoglah = "house of the partridge" or "place of partridge"

 1) a place in Benjamin on the border with Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-hoglah = "house of the partridge" or "place of partridge"

 1) a place in Benjamin on the border with Judah

    NASB:  place of partridge, a place in Benjamin
